verse.verse_4: Wa fī khalqikum wa mā yabuṡṡu min dābbatin āyātul liqaumiy yūqinūn(a).
verse.verse_5: Wakhtilāfil-laili wan-nahāri wa mā anzalallāhu minas-samā'i mir rizqin fa aḥyā bihil-arḍa ba‘da mautihā wa taṣrīfir-riyāḥi āyātul liqaumiy ya‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_6: Tilka āyātullāhi natlūhā ‘alaika bil-ḥaqq(i), fa bi'ayyi ḥadīṡim ba‘dallāhi wa āyātihī yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_8: Yasma‘u āyātillāhi tutlā ‘alaihi ṡumma yuṣirru mustakbiran ka'allam yasma‘hā, fa basysyirhu bi‘ażābin alīm(in).
verse.verse_9: Wa iżā ‘alima min āyātinā syai'anittakhażahā huzuwā(n), ulā'ika lahum ‘ażābum muhīn(un).
verse.verse_10: Miw warā'ihim jahannam(u), wa lā yugnī ‘anhum mā kasabū syai'aw wa lā mattakhażū min dūnillāhi auliyā'(a), wa lahum ‘ażābun ‘aẓīm(un).
verse.verse_11: Hāżā hudā(n), wal-lażīna kafarū bi'āyāti rabbihim lahum ‘ażābum mir rijzin alīm(un).
verse.verse_12: Allāhul-lażī sakhkhara  lakumul-baḥra litajriyal-fulku fīhi bi'amrihī wa litabtagū min faḍlihī wa la‘allakum tasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_13: Wa sakhkhara lakum mā fis-samāwāti wa mā fil-arḍi jamī‘am minh(u), inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy yatafakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_14: Qul lil-lażīna āmanū yagfirū lil-lażīna lā yarjūna ayyāmallāhi liyajziya qaumam bimā kānū yaksibūn(a).
verse.verse_15: Man ‘amila ṣāliḥan fa linafsih(ī), wa man asā'a fa ‘alaihā, ṡumma ilā rabbikum turja‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Wa laqad ātainā banī isrā'īlal-kitāba wal-ḥukma wan-nubuwwata wa razaqnāhum minaṭ-ṭayyibāti wa faḍḍalnāhum ‘alal-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_17: Wa ātaināhum bayyinātim minal-amr(i), fa makhtalafū illā mim ba‘di mā jā'ahumul-‘ilmu bagyam bainahum, inna rabbaka yaqḍī bainahum yaumal-qiyāmati fīmā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūn(a).
verse.verse_18: Ṡumma ja‘alnāka ‘alā syarī‘atim minal-amri fattabi‘hā wa lā tattabi‘ ahwā'al-lażīna lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_19: Innahum lay yugnū ‘anka minallāhi syai'ā(n), wa innaẓ-ẓālimīna ba‘ḍuhum auliyā'u ba‘ḍ(in), wallāhu waliyyul-muttaqīn(a).
verse.verse_20: Hāżā baṣā'iru lin-nāsi wa hudaw wa raḥmatul liqaumiy yūqinūn(a).
verse.verse_21: Am ḥasibal-lażīnajtaraḥus -sayyi'āti an naj‘alahum kal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti sawā'am maḥyāhum wa mamātuhum, sā'a mā yaḥkumūn(a).
verse.verse_22: Wa khalaqallāhus-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqqi wa litujzā kullu nafsim bimā kasabat wa hum lā yuẓlamūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Afa ra'aita manittakhaża ilāhahū hawāhu wa aḍallahullāhu ‘alā ‘ilmiw wa khatama ‘alā sam‘ihī wa qalbihī wa ja‘ala ‘alā baṣarihī gisyāwah(tan), famay yahdīhi mim ba‘dillāh(i), afalā tażakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_24: Wa qālū mā hiya illā ḥayātunad-dun-yā namūtu wa naḥyā wa mā yuhlikunā illad-dahr(u), wa mā lahum biżālika min ‘ilmin in hum illā yaẓunnūn(a).
verse.verse_25: Wa iżā tutlā ‘alaihim āyātunā bayyinātim mā kāna ḥujjatahum illā an qālu'tū bi'ābā'inā in kuntum ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_26: Qulillāhu yuḥyīkum ṡumma yumītukum ṡumma yajma‘ukum ilā yaumil-qiyāmati lā raiba fīhi wa lākinna akṡaran-nāsi lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_27: Wa lillāhi mulkus-samāwāti wal-arḍ(i), wa yauma taqūmus-sā‘atu yauma'iżiy yakhsarul-mubṭilūn(a).
verse.verse_28: Wa tarā kulla ummatin jāṡiyah(tan), kullu ummatin tud‘ā ilā kitābihā, al-yauma tujzauna mā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Hāżā kitābunā yanṭiqu ‘alaikum bil-ḥaqq(i), innā kunnā nastansikhu mā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_30: Fa'ammal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti fayudkhiluhum rabbuhum fī raḥmatih(ī), żālika huwal-fauzul-mubīn(u).
verse.verse_31: Wa ammal-lażīna kafarū, falam takun āyātī tutlā ‘alaikum fastakbartum wa kuntum qaumam mujrimīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Wa iżā qīla inna wa‘dallāhi ḥaqquw was-sā‘atu lā raiba fīhā qultum mā nadrī mas-sā‘ah(tu), in naẓunnu illā ẓannaw wa mā naḥnu bimustaiqinīn(a).
verse.verse_33: Wa badā lahum sayyi'ātu mā ‘amilū wa ḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihī yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Wa qīlal-yauma nansākum kamā nasītum liqā'a yaumikum hāżā, wa ma'wākumun nāru wa mā lakum min nāṣirīn(a).
verse.verse_35: Żālikum bi'annakumuttakhażtum āyātillāhi huzuwaw wa garratkumul-ḥayātud-dun-yā, fal-yauma lā yukhrajūna minhā wa lā hum yusta‘tabūn(a).
verse.verse_36: Fa lillāhil-ḥamdu rabbis-samāwāti wa rabbil-arḍi rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_37: Wa lahul-kibriyā'u fis-samāwāti wal-arḍ(i), wa huwal-‘azīzul-ḥakīm(u).
